title: FlatBlock
description: Modpack to make surviving on a superflat easily possible
body:
/!\ ========== IMPORTANT ========== /!\

When creating a world, do NOT choose the superflat preset!

The pack is set up where the default generation is a superflat.

Thank you!

---------- Info ----------

Survive on a superflat with only the resources available to you.

While theoretically possible alone, theres extra recipes to help you on your journey.

On the left side, there is the item list from REI. To see an items recipe, click it.

While hovering over an item in your inventory, press R to see the recipes or press U for the uses.

To locate yourself, press TAB for the minimap or M for the world map.

When the minimap is open, press [ to toggle chunk borders and ] to toggle slime chunks.

The Create mod is also included, allowing you to automate almost anything.

Essentials is included, allowing you to zoom with C and invite others with I. (make sure you understand and are ok with the dialogue box that shows up!)

Sodium + Iris shaders are included, as well as the BVS shader. Press K to toggle the shader or O to open the shader selection screen.

---------- Mods ----------

AppleSkin (https://modrinth.com/mod/EsAfCjCV)

Architectury (https://modrinth.com/mod/lhGA9TYQ)
